runs.note: Runs against Vite HMR only (no Tauri runtime). Measures renderer-side cost: y-prosemirror → shadow Y.Doc → invoke call path; invoke() silent-fails under Playwright so Rust IPC cost NOT captured.
Same harness as A. B adds shadow Y.Doc + event listener wiring but invoke() still silent-fails. Delta A→B ≈ listener setup + origin-tag handler cost only.

test_matrix_results.notes: Renderer + shadow Y.Doc + listener mounts and accepts text. Rust IPC not exercised.
Yjs-emitted v1 update decodes + applies in yrs; text matches.
Yjs insert/delete/insert sequence decodes correctly in yrs.
yrs-emitted v1 update decodes in Y.Doc; text matches.
Two Y.Docs with concurrent edits converge deterministically. Baseline for 5.
yrs applies yjs_a (alpha_) then inserts own beta_; both contributions present.
yrs concurrently merges yjs_a (client 1111) + yrs_b (client 2222); both contributions present.
yrs-side concurrent-merged state decodes in Y.Doc; text == yrs side recorded.
KEY PROOF: Yjs-side concurrent merge of (yjs_a + yrs_b) yields IDENTICAL text to yrs-side merge. yrs is byte-compatible with Yjs wire format for concurrent merge semantics.

notes: Scope (a) compressed test suite — 6 critical tests + 3 derived assertions. See s2-yjs-placement.md for qualitative observations. Under-test IPC latency for Proto B requires manual Tauri runtime measurement (CHECKPOINT 2 Kaan).
